Collaboration Center International Events International Events Visit of Dr. Anuj K. Chandel from University of Sao Paulo, Brazil : 9-10 January,2026 Invited talk by Prof. Sudhir at 5th International Conference on Recent Advances in Bio-Energy Research (ICRABR 2025) on 8th October 2025 Visit of Prof. Rajesh Sani of SD Mines to Jaypee University of Information Technology: September 15 -19, 2025 Virtual Meeting between JUIT and University Malaysia Sabah (UMS), Malaysia (August 26, 2025) MoU with Dr. Parteek Kumar’s Lab, WSU, USA (3 June, 2025) Report of Visit of Dr. Ashish Sharma (Alumni of ECE): 05-05-2025 An International Conference on Recent Developments on Interfaces of Chemistry, Biology and Material Sciences towards Health and Environment: 8th -10th October 2024 An International Conference on Recent Developments on Interfaces of Chemistry, Biology and Material Sciences towards Health and Environment: 8th -10th October 2024 SD Mines visit and Participaion in International Conference 13 May - 20 May 2024 Lecture cum interactive session of Professor Ashvini Chauhan. A&M University, Florida on 1st May 2024 Celebration of the Losar, 10th February Bhutanese Students Association - JUIT, Solan The celebration of Birth Anniversary of His Majesty the King Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck: 23.02.2024 JUIT: Australian Environmental Sustainability Delegation Explores Collaborative Ventures Invited Talk on Cyber Security by Shri Arun K Singh - CEO of Ilantus Technologies, Texas, USA (02 December, 2023) Dr. Ashok Kumar Nadda Delivered an invited talk as keynote speaker on the topic, "Nano-biocatalysis for Sustainable products & clean energy" at the 3rd International Conference on (NCBTA-2023) on 26th November 2023 in GLA University Mathura India Prof. Sudhir Kumar visited the South Dakota School of Mines & Technology, USA from 18- 25th October, 2023. Keynote Talk on Biohydrometallurgy by Prof. Sudhir Kumar in a symposium of WITS University, Johannesburg, SA (08 August, 2023) Invited Talk by Prof. Yosi Shacham Diamond, Tel Aviv University Israel (04 April, 2023) Dr. Hemant Sood, Associate Professor(BT&BI) was Moderator in the 7th Edition of the Global Congress on Plant Biology and Biotechnology on 16th March 2023 organized by Magnus Group, USA. Distinguished Speaker Seminar by Dr. Charles Allen Butlerm - 06 Feb. 2023 Meeting with Dr.Rajesh Sani on 26 Feb.,2023 Visit to Royal Bhutanese Embassy, New Delhi on 24th January 2023 Distinguished Speaker Seminar Series JUIT Society for Industrial and Applied Mathematics Jaypee University of Information Technology Student Chapter (Nov. 2022 – January 2023) Distinguished Speaker Seminar Series JUIT Student Chapter has organized an initiative known as the Distinguished Speaker Seminar Series. Under this series, renowned and eminent speakers join from academic and professional world, to share their wisdom and experience, so as to enhance the exposure and understanding of both the industry and academia. • "Decision Making under Uncertainty" by Dr. Mark S. Squillante Date: November 29, 2022 The speaker for the seminar was Dr. Mark S. Squillante, Distinguished Research Staff Member and Manager of Foundations of Probability, Dynamics and Control at IBM Research, for the agenda “Decision making under Uncertainty”. The seminar concluded with a Q&A session with the attendees, where both the faculty and the students asked their queries and discussed a few interesting applications of the discipline. • “Research in Computational and Applied Mathematics at NIST” by Dr. Bonita V. Saunders Date: January 11, 2023 The speaker for the seminar was Dr. Bonita V. Saunders, Leader, Mathematical Software Group Applied and Computational Mathematics Division (ACMD), Information Technology Laboratory, National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST), US Department of Commerce and shared her insights on the ongoing research in computational and applied mathematics at the NIST. The seminar concluded with a Q&A session with the attendees, where both the faculty and the students asked their queries and discussed a few interesting applications of the discipline. • SIAM Meet & Greet with Council Date: November 30, 2022 The SIAM organization conducted the fall 2022 student chapter virtual meet-up on October 19, 2022. Student chapters from all across the globe, including our own, participated in the meeting and shared the strategy for the upcoming tenure • SIAM Fall 2022 Meet-Up Date: October 19, 2022 The SIAM organization conducted the fall new student chapters virtual meet-up for the newly established chapters around the globe, attended by Durham University, England, VIT, Bhopal and our team. The meeting was chaired by Susanne C. Brenner, President SIAM, Kathleen Kavanagh, Vice President for Education and Maggie Hohendal, SIAM coordinator for student chapters. Mr. Arvind Kumar attended a conference and presented a paper during Dec 4- Dec 8, 2022 in Rio De Janeiro, Brazil. IEEE Global Communications Conference (GLOBECOM) - one of the IEEE Communications Society's two flagship conferences. Topic:- Delay Aware Fault-Tolerant Concurrent Data Collection Trees in Shared IIoT Applications. Seventh International Conference on Parallel, Distributed and Grid Computing (PDGC) 25th - 27th November, 2022 The 7th IEEE PDGC-2022 was organized during 25-27 November 2022 by the CSE & IT Department at JUIT Solan, HP, India. The conference witnessed 147 participants, 136 paper presenters and 11 attendees, and faculty, lab staff and students of the CSE & IT Department of JUIT. Three international keynote speakers and two national keynote speakers graced the conference with their expertise. More than 100 TPC members contributed to make the conference a success. The celebration of Birth Anniversary of His Majesty the King Fourth Druk Gyalpo, Jigme Singye Wangchuck: 14 November 2022 Celebration of "Blessed Rainy Day" by Bhutanese Students: 23 Sept. 2022 Dr. Sugandha Singh attends 26th International Conference on Structural Mechanics in Reactor Technology (SMiRT–26), Potsdam, Germany: July 10, 2022 to July 15, 2022. 2021 Sixth International Conference on Image Information processing(ICIIP-2021) organized by Department of Computer Science &Engineering &Information Technology in JUIT from via online mode on 26-28 November, 2021 International Conference on Renewable Energy for Sustainable Environment organized by CSTERD from Department of BT &BI in JUIT on online mode held on 23-24 November 2021 International Conference on Structures, Material and Construction 2021’ organized by Department of Civil Engineering in JUIT on online mode held on 12-13 November 2021 Dr. Arpit Goyal, Assistant Professor in Thapar Institute of Engineering & Technology, Patiala has delivered a talk entitled ‘Prospects of Higher Studies in Civil Engineering’ in webinar organized by Department of Civil Engineering,JUIT Waknagaht on Oct. 21,2021. Dr Ashok Nadda is a keynote speaker in World Congress on Applied Nanotechnology :Onine Congress in Turkey scheduled on 24 to 26th November 2021. Dr. Kong Kian Hau of National University of Singapore (NUS) delivered a Keynote Lecture entitled ‘Chemical Admixtures for Autonomous Healing in Concrete: The Past, Present and Future’ in the ‘International Conference on Structures, Material and Construction 2021’ held in JUIT on online mode held on 12-13 November 2021 Dr. Geng Guoqing of National University of Singapore (NUS) delivered a Keynote Lecture entitled ‘Structure and Property of Alkali Silica Reaction Products - Recent Evidence from Synchrotron-Radiation Methods’ in the ‘International Conference on Structures, Material and Construction 2021’ held in JUIT on online mode held on 12-13 November 2021 Dr. Gurnoor Singh works as a research data-steward in the Center for Molecular and Biomolecular Informatics, Radboud UMC, Nijmegen, in the Netherlands has delivered talk on Research Data Management and FAIR Principles for Healthcare Data in Webinar organized by Centre of Excellence in Healthcare Technologies and Informatics (CEHTI) from Department of BT and BI,JUIT on October 9, 2021 . Dr Ashok Nadda, Assistant Professor (SG) from the Department of BT & BI delivered a lecture on” Nanotextured materials for enzyme immobilization and nanobiocatalysis in 13th International Conference on Protein Stabilization” (PROTSTAB-2021) organized by European Society of Applied Biocatalysis(ESAB) Bulgaria,on 9th October 2021. 6th International Conference on Signal Processing, Computing and Control (ISPCC 2k21),organized by Department of ECE via online mode 07th -09th October 2021 Dr Ashok Nadda, Assistant Professor (SG) from the Department of BT & BI delivered a lecture on " Emerging trends in nano-biocatalysis for environmental remediation and carbon dioxide capture" in 5th International Conference on Global Sustainability and Chemical Engineering (ICGSCE ) 2021 organized by the School of Chemical engineering, College of Engineering, University Teknologi Mara 40450 Sha Alam, Selangor, Malaysia on 14th Sep 2021. Dr. Ankush Bansal from Centre for Neuroscience Research, Children's National Hospital, Washington DC, USA has delivered a webinar on the topic "AI platform to catalog unconventional stress proteins for deep exploration of space" in the International Webinar Series-II on research and technological advancements in Bioinformatics organized by Centre of Excellence in Healthcare Technologies and Informatics (CEHTI), Department of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics, Jaypee University of Information technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, Solan, H.P., INDIA on 11th September 2021 1st International Conference on Construction Materials and Environment (ICCME - 2021) organized by the Department of Civil Engineering, Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat on 3rd and 4th June ,2021 Report Dr. Arpit Goyal, from Coventry University, UK delivered a lecture on "Corrosion of Steel in Reinforced Concrete Structures" on 24th July 2020, organized by Department of Civil Engineering between 20th –24th July, 2020 Dr. Pankaj Munjal, from National University Singapore delivered a lecture on "Engineered Cementitious Composites (ECC) and its applications for strengthening of Masonry Structures" on 21st July 2020, organized by Department of Civil Engineering between 20th –24th July, 2020 Dr. Pankaj Munjal, from National University Singapore delivered a lecture on "Engineered Cementitious Composites (ECC) and its applications for strengthening of Masonry Structures" in Webinar organized by Department of Civil Engineering JUIT, Waknagaht. on July 21,2020 Related Links
